name: Red Binder, Prime
title: The binder given flesh

abilities.name: Summon the Collection
abilities.text: Deal 120. Put 3 random Red Binder cards from deck into play.

abilities.name: Binder's Judgment
abilities.text: Deal 300. If opponent has any card with 'Red' in its name, deal 150 more.

abilities.name: Close the Binder
abilities.text: All cards in play return to their owners' decks. You win ties on 'first to draw'.

typed_abilities.name: Summon the Collection
typed_abilities.text: Deal 120. Put 3 random Red Binder cards from deck into play.

typed_abilities.name: Binder's Judgment
typed_abilities.text: Deal 300. If opponent has any card with 'Red' in its name, deal 150 more.

typed_abilities.name: Close the Binder
typed_abilities.text: All cards in play return to their owners' decks. You win ties on 'first to draw'.

flavor_text: The binder that binds the binders. Red from spine to spine.
